_meta.description: TypeScript props API index for Mezzanine UI v2

types.AlertBannerType:
((props: AlertBannerData) => ReactElement | null) &
  Notifier<AlertBannerData, AlertBannerConfigProps> &
  Record<
    string,
    (
      message: AlertBannerData['message'],
      props?: Omit<AlertBannerData, 'message' | 'severity' | 'icon'> & {
        key?: Key

clearSearchText.description: Whether to clear search text when leaving the textfield/dropdown scope.

BreadcrumbItemProps.propsType:
| Omit<
      ComponentOverridableForwardRefComponentPropsFactory<
        BreadcrumbItemComponent,
        C,
        BreadcrumbItemTextProps | BreadcrumbLinkItemProps
      >,
      'children' | 'onSelect'
    >
  | BreadcrumbDropdownProps

types.CropperModalType:
((props: CropperModalProps) => ReactElement | null) & {
  open: (options: CropperModalOpenOptions) => Promise<CropperModalResult | null>

filterAreaOptions.description: Options for the filter bar dropdown.

filterAreaOnSelect.description: Callback fired when a filter bar dropdown option is selected.

filterAreaAllRadioLabel.description: The label of the all radio in filter area.

filterAreaCustomButtonLabel.description: The label of the custom button in filter area.

filterAreaDefaultValue.description: The default value of the radio group in filter area.

filterAreaIsEmpty.description: Whether the filter area content is empty (for disabling custom button).

filterAreaOnCustomButtonClick.description: The callback function when the custom button is clicked in filter area.

filterAreaOnRadioChange.description: The callback function when the radio group value changes in filter area.

filterAreaReadRadioLabel.description: The label of the read radio in filter area.

filterAreaShow.description: Controls whether to display the filter area.

filterAreaShowUnreadButton.description: Controls whether to display the unread button in filter area.

filterAreaUnreadRadioLabel.description: The label of the unread radio in filter area.

filterAreaValue.description: The value of the radio group in filter area.

types.AutoCompleteSingleValueControl:
AutoCompleteBaseValueControl & {
  onChange: (v: SelectValue | null) => SelectValue | null
types.SelectMultipleValueControl:
SelectBaseValueControl & {
  onChange: (v: SelectValue | SelectValue[] | null) => SelectValue[]
types.SelectSingleValueControl:
SelectBaseValueControl & {
  onChange: (v: SelectValue | null) => SelectValue | null

extendedSplitLeftSideContent.description: Content for the left side in extendedSplit layout.

extendedSplitRightSideContent.description: Content for the right side in extendedSplit layout.

extendedSplitSidebarPosition.description: Controls which side the sidebar panel appears on.

size.description: Size of the modal (only 'wide' allowed for extendedSplit).

onTriggerClick.type: (path: string[], currentKey: string, href?: string) => void

types.NavigationChild:
| ReactElement<NavigationFooterProps>
  | ReactElement<NavigationHeaderProps>
  | ReactElement<NavigationOptionCategoryProps>
  | ReactElement<NavigationOptionProps>
  | null
  | undefined
  | false

filterBarOnSelect.description: Callback fired when a filter bar option is selected.

renderResultSummary.type: (from: number, to: number, total: number) => string

withEditInput.description: Whether to show edit input for radio label.

scroll.type: TableScroll & { virtualized: true; y: number | string }

onMaxFilesExceeded.type: (maxFiles: number, selectedCount: number, currentCount: number) => void

Layout.note: Sub-components accessible as Layout.LeftPanel, Layout.Main, Layout.RightPanel. Children are automatically re-ordered into the correct DOM sequence.

LayoutLeftPanelProps.note: Resizable left side panel. Minimum width: 240px. Renders as null when open=false.

LayoutRightPanelProps.note: Resizable right side panel. Minimum width: 240px. Renders as null when open=false.
